product_updates.title: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system
product_updates.content: AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.

product_updates.title: Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models
product_updates.content: Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email.

product_updates.title: AegisAI, founded by former Google security execs, lands $36M to stop AI-driven spear phishing
product_updates.content: AegisAI co-founders developed AI agents that quickly analyze each message as a human would, paying attention to small anomalies that even the most elaborate checklist wouldn’t catch.

product_updates.title: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
product_updates.content: The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed or cost.

product_updates.title: OpenAI makes ChatGPT Health available to all US users
product_updates.content: Users can also integrate their personal data from services like Apple Health, Function, and MyFitnessPal.

product_updates.title: Meta launched a new AI optimism ad set to a song about human extinction
product_updates.content: David Bowie's song "Five Years," which Meta used in a supposedly inspiring advertisement, is about humans learning that they have five years left to live before the apocalypse.

product_updates.title: Nvidia is sending GPUs to the moon
product_updates.content: If there's a place in the universe without GPUs, Nvidia is sending them there.

product_updates.title: AI chip startup Etched defies skeptics, hits $10.3B valuation from big-name investors
product_updates.content: Etched, founded by three Harvard dropouts, has created new chips and memory components that speed up inference on any AI model -- no GPUs required, it says.

product_updates.title: Google’s Gemini nears billion-user milestone
product_updates.content: Gemini had over 750 million monthly users in February.

product_updates.title: Experts say exploiting Anthropic’s Fable isn’t how Kimi K3 got so good
product_updates.content: "I don't think you get a model this strong and this quickly on the heels of Fable doing strictly distillation," one expert told TechCrunch.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Supercooled kidneys have been transplanted into pigs in a “landmark achievement”
technical_breakthroughs.content: When it comes to organ donation, time is everything. As soon as an organ has been carefully removed from a donor’s body, it starts to deteriorate. Surgeons have a matter of hours to get it into a recipient. Leave it too long and the organ will become unusable. In most cases, organs will be kept…

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: energy transmission and US threats against Chinese AI
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. technical_breakthroughs.title: How AI helps scientists design the next generation of medicines
technical_breakthroughs.content: Designing and developing a new medicine is an expensive, failure-prone scientific challenge. A new drug can take many years to develop, at the cost of a significant investment. And even then, most possible candidates never reach the patient. For biologic medicines, therapies made from engineered …

technical_breakthroughs.title: The power line that could reshape New York’s grid is hitting snags
technical_breakthroughs.content: On July 3, as a heat wave swept the region, New York State’s grid imported 52 gigawatt-hours of electricity from Canada—enough to meet about 9% of its total electricity demand that day. Some of that power shuttled in on a 339-mile power line stretching from Quebec to Queens called the Champlain H…
